# overviewControlLabel

**Instance Property**

Allows customization of the “Overview” label.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var overviewControlLabel: String! { get set }
```

## Customizing Button Labels

- **scanControlLabel**: Allows customization of the “Scan” label.
